mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_bookmark (member_id, target_type, target_id) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId})
mapper.select: SELECT b.id, b.target_type AS "targetType", b.target_id AS "targetId", b.created_datetime AS "createdDatetime", CASE WHEN b.target_type = 'WORK' THEN w.title WHEN b.target_type = 'GALLERY' THEN g.title WHEN b.target_type = 'CONTEST' THEN c.title END AS "title", CASE WHEN b.target_type = 'WORK' THEN (SELECT wf.file_url FROM tbl_work_file wf WHERE wf.work_id = b.target_id ORDER BY wf.sort_order ASC, wf.id ASC LIMIT 1) WHEN b.target_type = 'GALLERY' THEN g.cover_image WHEN b.target_type = 'CONTEST' THEN c.cover_image END AS "thumbnail" FROM tbl_bookmark b LEFT JOIN tbl_work w ON b.target_type = 'WORK' AND b.target_id = w.id LEFT JOIN tbl_gallery g ON b.target_type = 'GALLERY' AND b.target_id = g.id LEFT JOIN tbl_contest c ON b.target_type = 'CONTEST' AND b.target_id = c.id WHERE b.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY b.created_datetime DESC
